emails.subject: Duke Energy Field 8/00
emails.body: Duke Energy Field 8/00 Please change the demand fee on deal 157288 for 8/00 from $9,575.45 to $6,143.64. We need to reduce our payment to Duke. When I adjusted the over delivery charge on the days we didn't nom, the demand amount changed. I waited until Duke agreed before I sent you this change. Thanks, Megan
